fields.summary: Returns the design coordinates for the specified named instance.
fields.returns: An array of design coordinate values for the named instance.

params.instanceIndex: The zero-based index of the named instance.

entries.signature: public int GetNamedInstanceDesignCoords (int instanceIndex, Span<float> coords);

fields.summary: Fills the provided span with the design coordinates for the specified named instance.
fields.returns: The number of design coordinates written into <paramref name="coords" />.

params.coords: The span to receive the design coordinates.
params.instanceIndex: The zero-based index of the named instance.

fields.summary: Returns the total number of design coordinates for the specified named instance.
fields.returns: The number of design coordinates for the named instance.

params.instanceIndex: The zero-based index of the named instance.

fields.summary: Returns the OpenType name ID for the PostScript name of the specified named instance.
fields.returns: The <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.OpenTypeNameId" /> for the PostScript name.

params.instanceIndex: The zero-based index of the named instance.

fields.summary: Returns the OpenType name ID for the subfamily name of the specified named instance.
fields.returns: The <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.OpenTypeNameId" /> for the subfamily name.

params.instanceIndex: The zero-based index of the named instance.

fields.summary: Returns the OpenType name ID associated with the specified color slot across all palettes.
fields.returns: The <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.OpenTypeNameId" /> for the color entry.

params.colorIndex: The zero-based index of the color entry.

fields.summary: Returns the ARGB color values for all entries in the specified palette.
fields.returns: An array of packed ARGB color values.

params.paletteIndex: The zero-based index of the palette.

entries.signature: public int GetPaletteColors (int paletteIndex, Span<uint> colors);

fields.summary: Fills the provided span with the ARGB color values for all entries in the specified palette.
fields.returns: The number of colors written into <paramref name="colors" />.

params.colors: The span to receive the packed ARGB color values.
params.paletteIndex: The zero-based index of the palette.

fields.summary: Returns the flags for the specified palette.

params.paletteIndex: The zero-based index of the palette.

fields.summary: Returns the OpenType name ID for the specified palette.

params.paletteIndex: The zero-based index of the palette.

fields.summary: Fills the provided span with information about each variation axis in the face.
fields.returns: The number of axis info entries written into <paramref name="axes" />.

params.axes: The span to receive the variation axis information.

fields.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the face contains color layer data (COLR/CPAL).
fields.value: <see langword="true" /> if the face has color layer data; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

fields.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the face contains embedded PNG color images.
fields.value: <see langword="true" /> if the face has PNG color images; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

fields.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the face contains embedded SVG color data.
fields.value: <see langword="true" /> if the face has SVG color data; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

fields.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the face contains color palette data.
fields.value: <see langword="true" /> if the face has color palette data; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

fields.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the face contains OpenType variable font data.
fields.value: <see langword="true" /> if the face has variation data; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

fields.summary: Gets the number of named instances defined in the variable font.
fields.value: The number of named instances, or 0 if the face is not a variable font.

fields.summary: Gets the number of color palettes in the face.
fields.value: The number of palettes, or 0 if the face has no palette data.

entries.signature: public bool TryFindVariationAxis (HarfBuzzSharp.Tag tag, out HarfBuzzSharp.OpenTypeVarAxisInfo axisInfo);

fields.summary: Attempts to find a variation axis with the specified tag.
fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the axis was found; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

params.tag: The four-byte tag identifying the axis.
params.axisInfo: When this method returns, contains the axis information if found.

fields.summary: Gets the number of variation axes defined in the variable font.
fields.value: The number of variation axes, or 0 if the face is not a variable font.

fields.summary: Gets an array containing information about each variation axis in the face.
fields.value: An array of <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.OpenTypeVarAxisInfo" /> structs, or an empty array if none exist.
